mapper.sql: and (publisher_id = #{userId} or assignee_id = #{userId} or create_by = 'admin' or assignee_name = #{username})
mapper.select:
select task_id, task_title, task_type, publisher_id, publisher_name, assignee_id, assignee_name, priority_level, task_status, case task_status when 'pending' then '待处理' when 'processing' then '进行中' when 'completed' then '已完成' else task_status end as task_status_label, start_time, due_time, complete_time, content, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from oa_task
and task_title like concat('%', #{taskTitle}, '%')
and task_status = #{taskStatus}
order by case task_status when 'pending' then 1 when 'processing' then 2 when 'completed' then 3 else 9 end, due_time asc, task_id desc

select task_id, task_title, task_type, publisher_id, publisher_name, assignee_id, assignee_name, priority_level, task_status, case task_status when 'pending' then '待处理' when 'processing' then '进行中' when 'completed' then '已完成' else task_status end as task_status_label, start_time, due_time, complete_time, content, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from oa_task where task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.update: update oa_task set task_status = 'completed', complete_time = sysdate(), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where task_id = #{taskId} and (publisher_id = #{userId} or assignee_id = #{userId} or assignee_name = #{username}) and task_status != 'completed'
update oa_task set task_status = 'processing', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where task_id = #{taskId} and assignee_id = #{userId} and task_status = 'pending'
